content: Tools available: [{"name": "findChunks", "description": "Allows loading text chunks by keywords from a bucket of text files", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"search_query": {"type": "string", "description": "a question about the things to search for"}}, "required": ["search_query"]}}, {"name": "sendMail", "description": "Allows sending emails", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"to": {"type": "string"}, "subject": {"type": "string"}, "body": {"type": "string"}}, "required": ["to", "subject", "body"]}}]. If you want to call an MCP tool, answer with [TOOL_CALL]{"tool": "<toolName>", "args": <toolArgs>}[/TOOL_CALL]. Output only valid JSON between the TOOL_CALL markers.
what concepts are common in most files in our file container?

[{"file": "/files/renewable_energy.txt", "chunkContent": "Renewable energy sources are becoming increasingly important as the world transitions away from fossil fuels. Solar power harnesses energy from the sun using photovoltaic panels, providing clean electricity with minimal environmental impact. Wind turbines convert kinetic energy from wind into electrical power, with offshore installations becoming more common. Hydroelectric dams generate power from flowing water, though they can have ecological consequences. Geothermal energy taps into heat from the Earth's core, offering consistent baseload power. The shift to renewables is driven by climate change concerns and technological advancements making these sources more cost-effective."}, {"file": "/files/dog_breeds.txt", "chunkContent": "Dogs have been human companions for thousands of years, evolving from wolves through domestication. There are over 300 recognized breeds, each with unique characteristics. Labrador Retrievers are known for their friendly nature and intelligence, often used as service animals. German Shepherds excel in police and military work due to their strength and trainability. Poodles, despite their fancy appearance, are highly intelligent and excel in obedience trials. The bond between dogs and humans is evident in their ability to understand emotions and provide comfort."}, {"file": "/files/ai_history.txt", "chunkContent": "The history of artificial intelligence began in ancient times with philosophers pondering the nature of thought and reasoning. In the 20th century, Alan Turing proposed the Turing Test, a method to determine if a machine can exhibit intelligent behavior. The field exploded in the 1950s with the development of the first neural networks and expert systems. Today, AI powers everything from recommendation algorithms to autonomous vehicles, revolutionizing industries and raising ethical questions about machine consciousness and job displacement."}]
